executive_summary: Iteration 000031 delivers WAN 2.2 audio/video pipeline support across 10 user stories. All 293 tests pass on CPU. All five pipelines (t2v, i2v, flf2v, s2v, ti2v) are implemented with manifest()/run() contracts, lazy-import patterns, example scripts, and unit tests. Two minor spec deviations: (1) flf2v manifest() returns 4 ModelEntry items instead of the 3 specified in US-007-AC01; (2) audio_encoders folder registered in ModelManager.__init__ (models.py) rather than _runtime.py as FR-11 specifies.
minor_observations: wan22_image_to_video_latent is defined in two places: latent.py (public function) and conditioning.py (internal helper used by ti2v). Consolidate into latent.py.
flf2v manifest() docstring says 'exactly 4' contradicting PRD US-007-AC01 which says 3. Reconciliation needed.
FR-11 specifies _runtime.py as registration location; implementation correctly uses ModelManager.__init__ in models.py. PRD wording should be updated.
wan_first_last_frame_to_video in conditioning.__all__ — verify it was pre-existing and not missing from a prior iteration's __all__.
conclusions_and_recommendations: Iteration 000031 is production-ready. 9/10 US fully comply. Recommended refactor targets: (1) Reconcile flf2v manifest count against reference workflow — update either flf2v.py or PRD US-007-AC01. (2) Update FR-11 wording to reflect registration in ModelManager.__init__. (3) Consolidate duplicate wan22_image_to_video_latent definition by removing the internal copy in conditioning.py and importing from comfy_diffusion.latent in ti2v.py.

refactor_plan.title: Reconcile flf2v manifest count
refactor_plan.description: Verify active model loader nodes in the reference WAN 2.2 FLF2V workflow JSON. If 3 is correct (one shared UNet), update flf2v.py manifest() to return 3 entries, update run() accordingly, and align the docstring and test assertion. If 4 is correct, update PRD US-007-AC01 to say 'exactly 4'.

refactor_plan.title: Update FR-11 PRD wording
refactor_plan.description: Change FR-11 description to reflect that audio_encoders/ is registered in ModelManager.__init__ (models.py) via folder_paths.add_model_folder_path, consistent with other model directories.

refactor_plan.title: Consolidate wan22_image_to_video_latent
refactor_plan.description: Remove the internal wan22_image_to_video_latent helper from conditioning.py. Update ti2v.py to import wan22_image_to_video_latent from comfy_diffusion.latent. Run uv run pytest to verify nothing breaks.
